description: Declarative manifest of Exegol v3 system capabilities used by ComplianceCodyAgent to map regulatory requirements to implemented features.

capabilities.name: Isolated Sandbox Execution
capabilities.description: All agent code execution occurs within a sandboxed environment preventing system-level side effects.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 9 - Risk Management

capabilities.name: Human-In-The-Loop (HITL) Controls
capabilities.description: High-risk or irreversible agent actions require explicit human approval before execution.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 14 - Human Oversight

capabilities.name: Comprehensive Audit Logging
capabilities.description: All agent interactions, decisions, and tool invocations are logged with timestamps and agent IDs.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 12 - Record Keeping

capabilities.name: Role-Based Access Control (RBAC)
capabilities.description: Agent capabilities are governed by a trust and RBAC system, restricting tool access by role.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 10 - Data Governance

capabilities.name: AI Interaction Disclosure
capabilities.description: System surfaces that users are interacting with an autonomous AI agent fleet.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 52 - Transparency Obligations

capabilities.name: API Key & Secret Lifecycle Management
capabilities.description: API keys are tracked for age, health, and automatically flagged for rotation via HITL queue.

capabilities.name: Egress Network Control
capabilities.description: All outbound agent network requests are filtered against an allowlist.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 9 - Risk Management

capabilities.name: Data Minimization & Local Processing
capabilities.description: Agent inference defaults to local Ollama models to avoid unnecessary data exfiltration.

capabilities.name: Input Validation & Sanitization
capabilities.description: All user-supplied and external inputs are sanitized before processing by agents.

capabilities.name: Automated Risk Scoring
capabilities.description: Proposed changes are automatically scored for risk before execution by the agent fleet.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 9 - Risk Management System

capabilities.name: Security Vulnerability Scanning
capabilities.description: Repository code is periodically scanned for known security vulnerabilities.

capabilities.name: Performance Metrics & KPI Tracking
capabilities.description: Agent success metrics and KPIs are tracked and surfaced in the Workbench UI.

capabilities.name: Model Selection Governance
capabilities.description: LLM model assignments per agent are governed by configuration, preventing arbitrary model use.

capabilities.name: Incident Response & Escalation
capabilities.description: Critical failures are automatically routed to human operators via Slack and HITL queue.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 62 - Serious Incident Reporting

capabilities.name: Bias & Fairness Evaluation
capabilities.description: LLM-as-Judge evaluator monitors agent outputs for quality and consistency across interactions.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 10 - Data & Governance

capabilities.name: Automated Testing & Regression Pipeline
capabilities.description: Agent outputs are regression-tested via snapshot testing and linting to prevent silent regressions.

capabilities.name: Continuous Compliance Monitoring
capabilities.description: Monthly automated sweeps check system capabilities against latest ML/AI regulations.
regulatory_relevance: EU AI Act Art. 72 - Post Market Monitoring

capabilities.name: Agent Reasoning Explainability
capabilities.description: Agent thought processes can be introspected and logged for audit and debugging.

capabilities.name: Software Supply Chain Security
capabilities.description: Dependency and third-party integrations are monitored; no unauthorized package installation.
capabilities.notes: Planned: integrate pip-audit or similar tool into the fleet cadence.

capabilities.name: Data Retention & Deletion Policy
capabilities.description: Interaction logs and agent outputs are subject to a defined retention and purge schedule.
capabilities.notes: Planned: add log rotation and auto-purge to fleet_logger.py.
